commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `toolsEnabled` guard before embedded runtime tool construction for `compat.supportsTools: false` models and adds a regression test asserting the tool factory is skipped.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +15. Total +16 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main derives `toolsEnabled` from `supportsModelTools` but still allows `shouldConstructTools` to call the runtime tool factory for no-tool models. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair is needed; maintainers should decide whether the focused regression plus Crabbox changed gate are enough for this draft performance change.

target.title: perf(agents): skip tool prep for toolless models
target.body:
## Summary

- skip OpenClaw runtime tool construction when the selected model declares `compat.supportsTools: false`
- add regression coverage so no-tool small-model runs do not pay the tool factory/import cost before the runner drops tools from the prompt

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.cwd-split.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.cwd-split.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_a56cd40d0ed9`, slug `silver-lobster`, run `run_c10bcadb8e57`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0, `leaseStopped=true`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Small/no-tool local models that set `compat.supportsTools: false` no longer build the full OpenClaw runtime tool surface before the runner drops tools from the model prompt.

Real environment tested: Local linked OpenClaw worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate runner.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.cwd-split.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: The focused regression/helper tests passed 24/24 across 2 Vitest shards; AWS Crabbox `run_c10bcadb8e57` completed `pnpm check:changed` with exit 0 across `core` and `coreTests` lanes.

Observed result after fix: The regression asserts `createOpenClawCodingTools` is not called when `supportsModelTools` returns false, while normal tool-enabled runs still construct tools.

What was not tested: A live Ollama/API small-model agent turn was not run in this PR; the follow-up small-model live matrix should cover Ollama plus representative small hosted model families.
target.author: vincentkoc
